activities_projects.title: Story Recall Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the main idea of the chapter
steps: Read the chapter 'The Sound of Music'
Write the names of the two main personalities in the chapter
Write one achievement of each person
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the main idea of the chapter

activities_projects.title: Personality Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify important personalities in the chapter
steps: Write the names Evelyn Glennie and Bismillah Khan
Write two lines about each personality
Share your answers with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes key personalities in the chapter

activities_projects.title: Instrument Recognition
steps: Write the names of instruments mentioned in the chapter
Identify which instrument Bismillah Khan played
Draw or paste a picture of the instrument
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands musical instruments in the story

activities_projects.title: Short Biography Writing
steps: Write five sentences about Evelyn Glennie
Include her challenge and achievement

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Activity
steps: Find five new words from the chapter
Write their meanings
Use each word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Event Sequencing
steps: Write important events from Evelyn Glennie's life
Arrange them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Reading Practice
steps: Select a paragraph from the chapter
Read it aloud with correct pronunciation
Practice reading with confidence

activities_projects.title: Music Appreciation
steps: Write three sentences about why music is important
Mention one musical instrument you like

activities_projects.title: Draw a Musical Instrument
steps: Draw the shehnai played by Bismillah Khan
Label the parts of the instrument

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Chapter
activities_projects.objective: Understand the lesson from the chapter
steps: Think about Evelyn Glennie's determination
Write the lesson learned from the chapter in 3–4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands values like determination and dedication
